mapper.insert: INSERT INTO solutions (problem_id, user_id, title, language) VALUES (#{solution.problemId}, #{solution.userId}, #{solution.title}, #{solution.language})
INSERT INTO solutions (problem_id, user_id, title, language, is_official) VALUES (#{solution.problemId}, #{solution.userId}, #{solution.title}, #{solution.language}, 1)
mapper.update:
UPDATE solutions
title = #{solution.title},
language = #{solution.language},
update_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
WHERE id = #{solution.id}
UPDATE solutions SET like_count = like_count + 1 WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE solutions SET comment_count = comment_count + 1 WHERE id = #{solutionId}
UPDATE solutions SET comment_count = comment_count - 1 WHERE id = #{solutionId}
UPDATE solutions SET like_count = like_count - 1 WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT solutions_with_content.id as id, solutions_with_content.problem_id, solutions_with_content.user_id, users.nickname, users.avatar, solutions_with_content.title, solutions_with_content.language, solutions_with_content.like_count, solutions_with_content.comment_count, solutions_with_content.is_official, solutions_with_content.create_time, solutions_with_content.update_time, solutions_with_content.content_md FROM (SELECT solutions.id id, solutions.problem_id problem_id, solutions.user_id user_id, solutions.title title, solutions.language language, solutions.like_count like_count, solutions.comment_count comment_count, solutions.is_official is_official, solutions.create_time create_time, solutions.update_time update_time, solution_content.content_md content_md FROM solutions JOIN solution_content ON solutions.id = solution_content.solution_id ) AS solutions_with_content JOIN users On solutions_with_content.user_id = users.id ORDER BY solutions_with_content.is_official DESC,solutions_with_content.update_time DESC
SELECT * FROM solutions JOIN solution_content ON solutions.id = solution_content.solution_id WHERE solutions.id = #{id}
SELECT title FROM problems WHERE id = #{id}
